briefdescription.para: Filter type selector for sensor pipeline.
Read function — returns the raw sensor value.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* SYN_SensorThresholdCallback) (struct SYN_Sensor *sensor, int16_t value, void *ctx)
memberdef.name: SYN_SensorThresholdCallback

briefdescription.para: Threshold callback — called when threshold is crossed.

parameterdescription.para: Function that reads the sensor hardware.
true to enable, false to disable.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_Sensor *sensor, int32_t threshold, int32_t band, SYN_SensorThresholdCallback on_high, SYN_SensorThresholdCallback on_low, void *ctx)
memberdef.name: syn_sensor_set_threshold

briefdescription.para: Set a threshold with hysteresis and callbacks.

parameterdescription.para: Called when value crosses above (threshold + band).
Called when value drops below (threshold - band).

detaileddescription.para: Each update pushes the filtered value into the signal window, giving you min/max/mean/variance/delta automatically.

parameterdescription.para: Initialized SYN_Signal instance, or NULL to detach.

briefdescription.para: Update the sensor — poll if interval elapsed, filter, check threshold.

detaileddescription.para: Call from your main loop or scheduler task.

simplesect.para: true if a new reading was taken this call.

briefdescription.para: Service an array of sensors (calls syn_sensor_update on each).
Sensor polling framework — periodic read → filter → threshold → event.

detaileddescription.para: Wires up the full sensor pipeline: poll at an interval, filter the reading, compare against thresholds (with hysteresis), and fire callbacks or set event flags.
